name: Todoist
description: Todoist integration for OpenClaw via the Todoist REST API. Enables your AI assistant to manage tasks, projects, and labels in Todoist.

apiToken.description: Todoist API token. Takes priority over the TODOIST_API_TOKEN environment variable.

apiToken.label: API Token
apiToken.help: Your Todoist API token from Settings > Integrations > Developer. Leave empty to use the TODOIST_API_TOKEN environment variable.
